name: Cortana Troubleshooting
description: Troubleshoot Cortana Paperclip, shim, router, budget, skills, memory, and UI incidents using read-only diagnostics and smoke-test workflows.

tools.name: cortana_diagnostic_snapshot
tools.description: Prepare a read-only diagnostic snapshot plan for the local Cortana stack. Does not mutate Docker, database, capability markers, credentials, or Paperclip state.

include_db_read_queries.description: Whether to include read-only Postgres inspection queries.

tools.name: cortana_incident_report
tools.description: Produce a structured Cortana incident report with symptom, evidence, likely boundary, minimal fix, and regression gate.

url.description: Optional Paperclip URL or local endpoint tied to the incident.

affected_issue.description: Optional Paperclip issue key or task id.
